# opencode 源码 LLM Wiki — 入口索引

> SST **opencode**(`Best/opencode/`,27-package Bun/TypeScript Effect monorepo,AI 编码 agent)的 agent 可检索知识库。用法:grep 本文件或 `index.json` 里的 id/title/source → 打开节点路径读对应自包含 `.md`。证据分级 `[E]/[I]/[U]`,staleness 用 opencode git SHA。机读清单见 `index.json`,规范见 `conventions.md`。
>
> **状态:大纲已 review 定稿(180 节点 + 14 grouped-catalog,9 路 source 测绘),护栏(lint/reconcile)就位,待并发填充(批次计划见 `_fill-prompts.md`,2 轮)。**
>
> **核心组织主线 —— V1/V2 迁移**:opencode 一套进程跑两代。**V1**(活跑)= `packages/opencode/src`,Vercel-AI-SDK,`SessionPrompt→SessionProcessor→LLM.stream`。**V2**(新内核,多数已建未设默认)= `packages/core/src`,命名空间 `@opencode/v2`,Effect-native durable/event-sourced。`packages/llm` = 原生协议引擎。每节点标 `v: v1|v2|shared|na`;hybrid 组织 —— 一概念一节点、内分 V1/V2,只有真正分叉(session 内核/tools/permissions/shell/patch/compaction)才拆 `-v1`/`-v2`。

## 怎么用
- **agent**:grep id / title / 符号名 → 打开 path;每个节点自包含,不必跨页拼。
- **人**:先读 `spine/overview` 与 `spine/v1-v2-relationship`,再按需深入 T1/T2。

## T0 — Spine(端到端脊柱,mermaid 先行)
- [opencode 总览与架构](spine/overview.md): 是什么 + 27-package monorepo 架构 + V1/V2 全景 — packages/opencode/src/index.ts · AGENTS.md
- [进程启动与运行时装配](spine/boot.md) `[v1]`: bin shim → yargs/cli → AppRuntime/InstanceStore — bin/opencode · src/index.ts · effect/app-runtime.ts
- [从 CLI 调用到运行中的 session](spine/cli-to-session.md) `[v1]`: CLI → 进程内 Hono-less Effect server → SDK → session — cli/cmd/run.ts · server/server.ts
- [V1 回合循环(活跑)](spine/v1-turn-loop.md) `[v1]`: runLoop → processor → LLM.stream → 工具循环 → compaction — session/prompt.ts · processor.ts · llm.ts
- [V1/V2 共存关系](spine/v1-v2-relationship.md): 谁在跑 · dual-write · 嵌入式接通点 — session/processor.ts · effect/runtime-flags.ts · core/src/public/opencode.ts
- [V2 Session Core 总览](spine/v2-overview.md) `[v2]`: admission↔execution 分离 · 事件溯源读模型 · Location-scoped runner — core/src/session.ts · session/runner/llm.ts
- [V2 prompt admission](spine/v2-admission.md) `[v2]`: SessionV2.prompt → session_input durable 入列 · steer/queue · resume — core/src/session/input.ts
- [V2 drain 协调](spine/v2-coordinator.md) `[v2]`: wake/run/interrupt 串行化 · 一链一 session · coalesce — core/src/session/run-coordinator.ts
- [V2 一次 provider turn](spine/v2-provider-turn.md) `[v2]`: 装配 → 单次 llm.stream → 工具 settle → 续跑 — core/src/session/runner/llm.ts
- [V2 Context Epoch 生命周期](spine/v2-context-epoch.md) `[v2]`: initialize/prepare/replace/advance · fencing — core/src/session/context-epoch.ts · CONTEXT.md
- [V2 EventV2 原子 publish→project→persist](spine/v2-event-sourcing.md) `[v2]`: 事务提交 · aggregate seq · beforeCommit guard — core/src/event.ts · session/projector.ts

### 端到端 worked traces
- [trace:首条 prompt(V2)](spine/trace-first-prompt.md) `[v2]`: create → admit → wake → epoch init → 一回合 → assistant text
- [trace:带工具调用的回合](spine/trace-tool-call.md): stream tool-call → durable Tool.Called → eager settle → 续跑
- [trace:回合中 steering(V2)](spine/trace-steer-mid-turn.md) `[v2]`: admit steer → coalesced wake → 下个安全边界 promote
- [trace:上下文溢出与压缩](spine/trace-compaction-overflow.md): compactIfNeeded vs provider-overflow recovery

## T1 — Surface / Tools(每工具一节点,17,hybrid V1/V2;ground truth = registry.ts / tools.ts)
- [Read](surface/tools/read.md) `[shared]`: 读文件/目录/图片/PDF,分页+行/字节上限 — opencode tool/read.ts · core tool/read.ts
- [Edit](surface/tools/edit.md) `[shared]`: 精确字符串替换(V1 含 9 路 fuzzy;V2 仅精确)— opencode tool/edit.ts · core tool/edit.ts
- [Write](surface/tools/write.md) `[shared]`: 整文件写 — opencode tool/write.ts · core tool/write.ts
- [Bash/Shell](surface/tools/bash.md) `[shared]`: 执行 shell(wire id "bash")· V1 tree-sitter 审批 / V2 精简 — opencode tool/shell.ts · core tool/bash.ts
- [Glob](surface/tools/glob.md) `[shared]`: 按 glob 找文件 — opencode tool/glob.ts · core tool/glob.ts
- [Grep](surface/tools/grep.md) `[shared]`: ripgrep 内容搜索 — opencode tool/grep.ts · core tool/grep.ts
- [Apply-Patch](surface/tools/apply-patch.md) `[shared]`: 多文件补丁(GPT 模型;V1 支持 move,V2 拒 move)— opencode tool/apply_patch.ts · core tool/apply-patch.ts
- [Task](surface/tools/task.md) `[v1]`: spawn 子 agent(fg/bg)— opencode tool/task.ts
- [WebFetch](surface/tools/webfetch.md) `[shared]`: 取 URL→md/text/html — opencode tool/webfetch.ts · core tool/webfetch.ts
- [WebSearch](surface/tools/websearch.md) `[shared]`: Exa/Parallel 搜索 — opencode tool/websearch.ts · core tool/websearch.ts
- [TodoWrite](surface/tools/todowrite.md) `[shared]`: 会话 todo 列表 — opencode tool/todo.ts · core tool/todowrite.ts
- [Skill](surface/tools/skill.md) `[shared]`: 加载 SKILL.md — opencode tool/skill.ts · core tool/skill.ts
- [Question](surface/tools/question.md) `[shared]`: 回合中向用户提问 — opencode tool/question.ts · core tool/question.ts
- [LSP](surface/tools/lsp.md) `[v1]`: 代码智能(experimental)— opencode tool/lsp.ts
- [Plan-Exit](surface/tools/plan-exit.md) `[v1]`: 退出 plan 模式(experimental)— opencode tool/plan.ts
- [Invalid](surface/tools/invalid.md) `[v1]`: malformed-call 占位 — opencode tool/invalid.ts
- [External-directory 守卫](surface/tools/external-directory.md) `[shared]`: 越界路径审批 helper — opencode tool/external-directory.ts

> 工具机制(registry 装配/gating/MCP·plugin 注入/output 截断)见 `subsystems/server/plugin-system.md` 与 `reference/tool-interface.md`。

## T1 — Surface / 其它可见面
### Agents & prompts
- [内置 agents 目录](surface/agents/builtins.md) `[v1]`: build/plan/general/explore/title/summary/compaction — agent/agent.ts
- [Agent 配置与 LLM 生成](surface/agents/config.md): agent config + generate — agent/agent.ts · config/agent.ts
- [System-prompt 选择与 catalog](surface/prompts/system-prompts.md) `[v1]`: 按模型族选 + agent override + reminders — session/system.ts · session/prompt/*.txt

### CLI(两 host)
- [Legacy CLI 子命令 catalog](surface/cli/opencode-yargs.md) `[v1]`: ~25 yargs 子命令 — src/index.ts · cli/cmd/
- [新 CLI(lildax)框架与 daemon](surface/cli/lildax-framework.md): @opencode-ai/cli framework + service/daemon — packages/cli/src/framework/
- [opencode run 三模式](surface/cli/run.md) `[v1]`: 非交互/交互本地/交互 attach — cli/cmd/run.ts

### Config(catalog,V1+V2)
- [V1 Config:核心/agents/permissions](surface/config/v1-core.md) `[v1]` — core/src/v1/config/{config,agent,permission}.ts
- [V1 Config:providers/MCP/LSP/formatters](surface/config/v1-providers-mcp-lsp.md) `[v1]` — core/src/v1/config/{provider,mcp,lsp,formatter}.ts
- [V1 Config:compaction/attachments/skills/commands/experimental/server](surface/config/v1-misc.md) `[v1]`
- [V2 Config schema](surface/config/v2-schema.md) `[v2]`: Config.Info 重命名键集 — core/src/config.ts
- [V1→V2 config 迁移](surface/config/migration.md): isV1/migrate 重命名表 — core/src/v1/config/migrate.ts
- [TUI 专属配置](surface/config/tui.md) `[na]`: theme/keybinds/sounds — config/tui.ts

### Providers / Auth
- [Provider/model 解析](surface/providers/resolution.md) `[v1]`: models.dev → AI-SDK LanguageModelV3 — provider/provider.ts · core/src/models-dev.ts
- [Provider auth flows 与 accounts](surface/providers/auth-accounts.md): api/oauth/device-code + account 登录 — auth/index.ts · account/account.ts
- [Provider catalog](surface/providers/catalog.md): 内建 provider 总表 — packages/llm/src/providers/ · provider/provider.ts

### Server API / SDK / Plugin API
- [Server API 总览](surface/server-api/overview.md): 两 server · 三层路由 · middleware · SSE/WS — server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts · server/src/api.ts · specs/v2/api.html
- [V1 路由 catalog(~128)](surface/server-api/v1-routes.md) `[v1]` — server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/
- [V2 路由 catalog(/api/*,~30)](surface/server-api/v2-routes.md) `[v2]` — packages/server/src/groups/
- [SDK 架构](surface/sdk/overview.md): 生成(hey-api)· client · server spawn — sdk/js/src/client.ts · script/build.ts
- [SDK 面 catalog(v1 + v2)](surface/sdk/surface.md): resource group→method — sdk/js/src/{gen,v2/gen}/sdk.gen.ts
- [V1 插件 API(Hooks)](surface/plugin-api/v1-hooks.md) `[v1]`: ~20 callback hooks + tool factory — packages/plugin/src/index.ts
- [V2 插件 API](surface/plugin-api/v2-hooks.md) `[v2]`: catalog.transform/aisdk.language/aisdk.sdk — core/src/plugin.ts
- [TUI 插件 API](surface/plugin-api/tui.md) `[na]`: TuiPluginApi — packages/plugin/src/tui.ts

## T2 — Subsystems / Tool system(3,用户头号诉求的机制层)
- [V1 工具系统](subsystems/tools/v1.md) `[v1]`: registry 装配 · 文件系统/plugin 工具发现 · gating · MCP 注入 · AI-SDK bridge — tool/registry.ts · session/tools.ts
- [V2 工具系统](subsystems/tools/v2.md) `[v2]`: opaque carrier · scoped registry · materialize/settle · ApplicationTools — core/src/tool/{tool,registry,tools,builtins}.ts
- [工具输出截断与保留](subsystems/tools/output-bounding.md) `[shared]`: V1 truncate(2000 行/50KB)/ V2 output-store — tool/truncate.ts · core/src/tool-output-store.ts

## T2 — Subsystems / Session V2(10)
- [Session inbox](subsystems/session-v2/inbox.md) `[v2]`: admit/promote/hasPending · legacy bridge — core/src/session/input.ts
- [System Context 代数](subsystems/session-v2/system-context-algebra.md) `[v2]`: Source<A> · make/combine · initialize/reconcile/replace — core/src/system-context/index.ts
- [System Context registry 与 built-ins](subsystems/session-v2/system-context-registry.md) `[v2]` — core/src/system-context/{registry,builtins}.ts
- [投影历史选择](subsystems/session-v2/history-selection.md) `[v2]`: compaction + epoch cutoff — core/src/session/history.ts
- [Session projector](subsystems/session-v2/projector.md) `[v2]`: event→读模型 · epoch reset 触发 — core/src/session/projector.ts
- [LLMEvent→durable event 翻译](subsystems/session-v2/llm-event-publisher.md) `[v2]` — core/src/session/runner/publish-llm-event.ts
- [投影消息→provider 消息 lowering](subsystems/session-v2/message-lowering.md) `[v2]` — core/src/session/runner/to-llm-message.ts
- [Runner 模型解析](subsystems/session-v2/model-resolution.md) `[v2]`: catalog→route/protocol/auth — core/src/session/runner/model.ts
- [V2 自动/溢出压缩](subsystems/session-v2/compaction.md) `[v2]` — core/src/session/compaction.ts
- [Location-scoped runner 装配](subsystems/session-v2/location-wiring.md) `[v2]`: LocationServiceMap · OpenCode.layer vs noopLayer — core/src/location-layer.ts

## T2 — Subsystems / Session V1(6)
- [SessionPrompt 编排器](subsystems/session-v1/prompt.md) `[v1]`: user msg/loop/subtask/command/shell — session/prompt.ts
- [Stream processor 与 part 生命周期](subsystems/session-v1/processor.md) `[v1]`: events→parts · doom-loop · retry · V2 dual-write — session/processor.ts
- [LLM 服务与 runtime seam](subsystems/session-v1/llm-runtime.md) `[v1]`: AI-SDK 默认 vs native 可选 — session/llm.ts · session/llm/{ai-sdk,native-runtime}.ts
- [V1 压缩/剪枝/溢出](subsystems/session-v1/compaction-overflow.md) `[v1]` — session/{compaction,overflow,summary}.ts
- [指令发现与注入](subsystems/session-v1/instructions.md) `[v1]`: AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md — session/instruction.ts
- [Session/message/part 存储与转换](subsystems/session-v1/store.md) `[v1]` — session/session.ts · message-v2.ts · revert.ts

## T2 — Subsystems / Model layer(10)
- [原生 LLM 协议引擎](subsystems/model-layer/llm-protocol-engine.md): Route/Protocol/Transport/Auth 4 轴 · compile 管线 — packages/llm/src/route/
- [LLM 规范类型](subsystems/model-layer/llm-schema.md): LLMRequest/Message/LLMEvent/Usage/LLMError — packages/llm/src/schema/
- [6 个 wire 协议](subsystems/model-layer/llm-protocols.md): anthropic/openai-responses/openai-chat/openai-compatible/gemini/bedrock — packages/llm/src/protocols/
- [原生引擎类型安全工具与 dispatch](subsystems/model-layer/llm-tools.md) — packages/llm/src/{tool,tool-runtime}.ts
- [V1 provider 注册内部](subsystems/model-layer/provider-registry-v1.md) `[v1]`: catalog merge/loaders/SDK 加载 — provider/provider.ts
- [Per-provider 变换](subsystems/model-layer/provider-transforms.md) `[v1]`: 消息/选项/reasoning — provider/transform.ts
- [凭据存储与 auth/account 流程](subsystems/model-layer/auth.md): credential union · provider auth · device-code — auth/index.ts · provider/auth.ts · account/
- [GitHub Copilot 特化](subsystems/model-layer/copilot.md): chat + responses 适配 · hosted tools — core/src/github-copilot/
- [V2 catalog](subsystems/model-layer/model-catalog-v2.md) `[v2]`: ProviderV2/ModelV2 · plugin-ordered · policy-gated — core/src/{catalog,provider}.ts · plugin/provider/
- [V2 SQLite 凭据 + Connector](subsystems/model-layer/credential-v2.md) `[v2]` — core/src/credential/sql.ts · connector.ts

## T2 — Subsystems / Execution(11)
- [V1 权限模型](subsystems/execution/permissions-v1.md) `[v1]`: ask/allow/deny · 内存 ruleset · last-match-wins — permission/index.ts
- [V2 权限模型](subsystems/execution/permissions-v2.md) `[v2]`: assert/action/resources/save · 持久化 — core/src/permission.ts · permission/saved.ts
- [V1 shell 执行](subsystems/execution/shell-v1.md) `[v1]`: tree-sitter 审批 · arity prefix · 流式 spill — tool/shell.ts · shell/shell.ts · permission/arity.ts
- [V2 bash 工具](subsystems/execution/shell-v2.md) `[v2]`: 精简移植 + 欠债 TODO — core/src/tool/bash.ts
- [V1 apply_patch 引擎+工具](subsystems/execution/patch-v1.md) `[v1]`: 4-pass fuzzy · add/update/delete/move — patch/index.ts · tool/apply_patch.ts
- [V2 apply_patch 引擎+工具](subsystems/execution/patch-v2.md) `[v2]`: 拒 move · 顺序 + 乐观并发 — core/src/patch.ts · tool/apply-patch.ts
- [Snapshots & Revert](subsystems/execution/snapshots.md) `[v1]`: shadow git · track/restore/revert — snapshot/index.ts · session/revert.ts
- [Git CLI wrapper](subsystems/execution/git.md) `[v1]` — git/index.ts
- [Worktree 管理](subsystems/execution/worktree.md) `[v1]`: agent sandbox — worktree/index.ts
- [后台 jobs](subsystems/execution/background.md): ephemeral 进程内 — background/job.ts
- [PTY 子系统](subsystems/execution/pty.md) `[v2]`: bun/node-pty · WS · connect ticket — core/src/pty/

## T2 — Subsystems / Integrations(9)
- [MCP 客户端](subsystems/integrations/mcp-client.md) `[v1]`: stdio/http/sse + OAuth · tool/resource 发现 — mcp/
- [LSP 集成](subsystems/integrations/lsp.md) `[v1]`: per-(server,root) 池 · diagnostics — lsp/{lsp,client,server}.ts
- [IDE 集成](subsystems/integrations/ide.md) `[v1]`: VS Code 系探测 + 装扩展 — ide/index.ts
- [ACP server](subsystems/integrations/acp.md) `[v1]`: opencode 当 ACP agent — acp/
- [Skills](subsystems/integrations/skills.md): SKILL.md 发现/加载 · V1 vs V2 — skill/ · core/src/skill.ts
- [自定义 slash 命令](subsystems/integrations/commands.md): md 命令 + MCP prompts + skills — command/ · core/src/command.ts
- [代码 formatters](subsystems/integrations/formatters.md) `[v1]`: 扩展名匹配 + $FILE — format/
- [Ask-user / Question](subsystems/integrations/question.md): Deferred 阻塞提问 — question/ · core/src/question.ts
- [图片处理](subsystems/integrations/image.md): Photon WASM normalize/resize — image/ · core/src/image.ts

## T2 — Subsystems / Persistence(7)
- [配置加载](subsystems/persistence/config-loading.md): 发现/分层/合并/变量替换/managed — config/config.ts · core/src/config.ts
- [V1 JSON 键值存储](subsystems/persistence/storage-v1.md) `[v1]` — storage/storage.ts
- [V2 数据库](subsystems/persistence/database.md) `[v2]`: Drizzle/SQLite · Bun/Node driver · 迁移 — core/src/database/
- [Project/Instance/Location/Worktree 模型](subsystems/persistence/project-instance-location.md): 身份/解析 — core/src/{project,location}.ts · project/instance-store.ts
- [事件系统](subsystems/persistence/eventing.md): GlobalBus + EventV2 bridge — bus/global.ts · event-v2-bridge.ts · core/src/event.ts
- [安装与升级](subsystems/persistence/installation.md): version/channel/method — installation/index.ts
- [文件系统/ripgrep/fff](subsystems/persistence/filesystem-search.md) `[v2]` — core/src/filesystem/ · ripgrep/binary.ts

## T2 — Subsystems / TUI(12)
- [TUI 架构(OpenTUI + SolidJS)](subsystems/tui/architecture.md) `[na]`: CliRenderer · ~25 provider stack · 反应式渲染 — packages/tui/src/app.tsx
- [TUI 路由](subsystems/tui/routing.md) `[na]`: store 判别联合(home/session/plugin)— tui/src/context/route.tsx
- [TUI Sync store](subsystems/tui/sync-store.md) `[na]`: 服务端状态镜像 · SDK 事件流 — tui/src/context/{sync,sdk}.tsx
- [Session(聊天)屏](subsystems/tui/session-screen.md) `[na]`: 消息/part 渲染 · 工具渲染器 · 流式 — tui/src/routes/session/index.tsx
- [Home 屏](subsystems/tui/home-screen.md) `[na]` — tui/src/routes/home.tsx
- [TUI 主题引擎](subsystems/tui/theming.md) `[na]`: ThemeJson 解析 · 32 内建 · system 主题 — tui/src/theme/index.ts
- [TUI 键位与命令](subsystems/tui/keybindings.md) `[na]`: mode 栈 · leader · ~230 binds — tui/src/keymap.tsx · config/keybind.ts
- [TUI feature-plugins 与 slots](subsystems/tui/feature-plugins.md) `[na]`: slot 扩展模型 · 12 builtins — tui/src/feature-plugins/builtins.ts · plugin/slots.tsx
- [TUI prompt 输入组件](subsystems/tui/prompt.md) `[na]`: autocomplete/history/stash — tui/src/component/prompt/index.tsx
- [TUI dialog & UI kit](subsystems/tui/dialog-kit.md) `[na]` — tui/src/ui/dialog.tsx · toast.tsx
- [TUI 托管与 bootstrap](subsystems/tui/runtime-hosting.md) `[v1]`: $0 命令 · worker server · plugin host — cli/cmd/tui.ts · cli/tui/worker.ts
- [opencode run scrollback runtime](subsystems/tui/run-scrollback.md) `[v1]`: 独立 split-footer 运行时 — cli/cmd/run/

## T2 — Subsystems / Server & cloud(6)
- [HTTP server](subsystems/server/http-server.md): V1+V2 都用 Effect HttpApi · 三层 · in-process vs port — server/server.ts · packages/server/src/
- [嵌入式原生 API](subsystems/server/embedded-public-api.md) `[v2]`: @opencode/public/OpenCode — core/src/public/
- [会话分享](subsystems/server/sharing.md): ShareNext/SessionShare · disabled/manual/auto — share/ · core/src/share/sql.ts
- [Control Plane / Workspaces](subsystems/server/control-plane.md): workspace 编排 · adapters · sync — control-plane/ · core/src/control-plane/
- [Observability](subsystems/server/observability.md) `[v2]`: 日志 + OTLP logs/traces(无 metrics)— core/src/observability/
- [插件系统](subsystems/server/plugin-system.md): V1 加载/生命周期 + V2 + TUI host + 内建 auth/provider 插件 — plugin/ · core/src/plugin.ts

## T2 — Subsystems / Clients(6,full-depth)
- [Desktop 应用(Electron)](subsystems/clients/desktop.md) `[na]`: server sidecar + app 渲染 — packages/desktop/
- [App UI shell(SolidJS)](subsystems/clients/app.md) `[na]`: 浏览器/Electron 共享前端 + Platform 抽象 — packages/app/
- [Web/文档站(Astro+Starlight)](subsystems/clients/web.md) `[na]` — packages/web/
- [Console(SolidStart)](subsystems/clients/console.md) `[na]`: 计费/管理 · Stripe/OpenAuth/Drizzle — packages/console/
- [共享 UI 组件库](subsystems/clients/ui.md) `[na]`: v1+v2 组件 · 主题 · i18n — packages/ui/
- [Storybook](subsystems/clients/storybook.md) `[na]` — packages/storybook/

## T2 — Subsystems / Infra(5,full-depth)
- [构建与 monorepo](subsystems/infra/build-monorepo.md) `[na]`: Bun + Turbo + catalog — turbo.json · package.json
- [原生二进制与发布](subsystems/infra/native-binary-release.md) `[na]`: Bun.build 12 target · npm/Docker/Homebrew/AUR — packages/opencode/script/build.ts · install
- [SST 云基础设施](subsystems/infra/sst.md) `[na]`: Cloudflare/AWS · Workers/R2/DO/PlanetScale — sst.config.ts · infra/
- [CI/CD workflows](subsystems/infra/ci-workflows.md) `[na]`: ~26 GH Actions — .github/workflows/
- [Nix flake](subsystems/infra/nix.md) `[na]`: dev shell + 可复现构建 — flake.nix · nix/

## T2 — Subsystems / Peripheral packages(8,full-depth)
- [Slack 集成](subsystems/peripheral/slack.md) `[na]` — packages/slack/
- [Cloud Function](subsystems/peripheral/function.md) `[na]`: CF Worker 公共分享后端 + GitHub App — packages/function/
- [Enterprise / 自托管](subsystems/peripheral/enterprise.md) `[na]`: SolidStart 分享后端 + viewer — packages/enterprise/
- [Stats](subsystems/peripheral/stats.md) `[na]`: 用量/成本统计 — packages/stats/
- [Containers](subsystems/peripheral/containers.md) `[na]`: CI Dockerfiles — packages/containers/
- [http-recorder](subsystems/peripheral/http-recorder.md) `[na]`: Effect HTTP 录放 cassette — packages/http-recorder/
- [effect-(drizzle-)sqlite 适配包](subsystems/peripheral/effect-sqlite.md) `[na]` — packages/effect-drizzle-sqlite/ · effect-sqlite-node/
- [script + identity](subsystems/peripheral/script-identity.md) `[na]`: 发布版本逻辑 + 品牌资源 — packages/script/ · identity/

## T3 — Reference
- [Tool 接口 catalog](reference/tool-interface.md): V1 Def/Context vs V2 Definition/Tool.make — opencode tool/tool.ts · core tool/tool.ts
- [Effect-Schema→JSONSchema + Zod boxing](reference/tool-schema-conversion.md) `[v1]` — tool/json-schema.ts · registry.ts
- [共享 LLM 工具协议类型](reference/tool-wire-protocol.md) — packages/llm/src/schema/messages.ts · tool-runtime.ts
- [全工具字段 catalog](reference/tool-catalog.md): 每工具每字段 type/default/limit — tool/ · core/src/tool/
- [工具 prompt 文件清单](reference/tool-prompts.md) `[v1]`: *.txt + shell 模板 — tool/*.txt
- [协议 catalog](reference/llm-protocol-catalog.md): 每协议 body/stream 状态机 — packages/llm/src/protocols/
- [Provider facade catalog](reference/llm-provider-facade-catalog.md): configure/env/默认 route — packages/llm/src/providers/
- [V1 provider→npm 映射 + loaders](reference/ai-sdk-provider-map.md) `[v1]` — provider/provider.ts
- [LLMEvent(16)+Usage+LLMError catalog](reference/llm-event-catalog.md) — packages/llm/src/schema/{events,errors}.ts
- [Auth 组合子 + 凭据变体](reference/auth-combinators.md) — packages/llm/src/route/auth.ts · auth/index.ts
- [Copilot 6 hosted 工具](reference/copilot-tool-catalog.md) — core/src/github-copilot/responses/tool/
- [Per-provider reasoning variant 表](reference/reasoning-variant-tables.md) `[v1]` — provider/transform.ts
- [权限 action catalog](reference/permission-actions.md): V1 keys↔V2 actions — v1/config/permission.ts · core/src/permission.ts
- [Bash arity 表](reference/bash-arity.md) `[v1]` — permission/arity.ts
- [apply_patch 格式与 fuzzy passes](reference/patch-format.md) — core/src/patch.ts · patch/index.ts
- [Config key 全 catalog(V1+V2)](reference/config-keys.md) — v1/config/ · core/src/config/
- [Env var / feature flag catalog(~80)](reference/env-vars.md) — flag/flag.ts · effect/runtime-flags.ts
- [DB schema catalog(19 表 + 33 迁移)](reference/db-schema.md) `[v2]` — core/src/*/sql.ts · database/migration/
- [ID 前缀 catalog](reference/id-prefixes.md): 前缀 + project-ID hashing — core/src/id/id.ts · project.ts
- [内建 LSP servers 表(40)](reference/lsp-servers.md) `[v1]` — lsp/server.ts
- [内建 formatters 表(27)](reference/formatters.md) `[v1]` — format/formatter.ts
- [扩展名→languageId 映射](reference/lsp-language-map.md) `[v1]` — lsp/language.ts
- [内建主题 catalog(32)](reference/themes.md) `[na]` — tui/src/theme/
- [键位与命令 reference(~230)](reference/keybinds.md) `[na]` — tui/src/config/keybind.ts
- [Slot 名 catalog](reference/tui-slots.md) `[na]` — tui/src/plugin/slots.tsx
- [Dialog catalog](reference/tui-dialogs.md) `[na]` — tui/src/component/ · ui/
- [TuiPluginApi reference](reference/tui-api.md) `[na]` — tui/src/plugin/adapters.tsx
- [事件 catalog](reference/events.md): V1 bus + V2 session.next.* + ApiEvent — core/src/session/event.ts
- [术语表与 codename](reference/glossary.md) — CONTEXT.md · AGENTS.md
- [不确定项日志](reference/uncertainty.md): `[U]` 汇总
- [Package 索引(27 包一句话)](reference/package-index.md) — package.json · packages/
- [核心共享数据模型](reference/data-model.md) — core/src/session/{message,schema}.ts

## 工具
- [lint 工具](tools/lint.mjs): L1 机械校验(已就位,0 error)· [reconcile](tools/reconcile.mjs): frontmatter→index.json 同步 + 新节点登记 + _staging 合并(已就位)
